pipeline_status.poller: PRED-105 silent-ignore at ~4.92 days (8 consecutive polls). Manual-commit drought crossed 5-day threshold (9 polls auto-only). Dome site otherwise stable — no new WINs, no parameter drift.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-231 completed (WIN-069 ISS-1432 + ISS-1433). Two proposals processed. Stable.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 4 pending reviews processed this run. Digest now at 0 pending. Queue depth 7 (queue items 231-237 still awaiting curmudgeon review).
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN (non-critical). Stable build. FUSE staleness on docs/index.html. 3447+ test pass.
pipeline_status.social: No new drafts pending. llms.txt current.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No content changes. PRED-105 silent-ignore continues. predictions.html byte-identical for 7 consecutive polls.

self_applied_patches.description: EXP-231 applied: (1) added 90-Mile Straight anchor sentence to detail_evidence for 0.4% figure (closes ISS-1432). (2) Added Huber & Rust 2016 / Giacomin & Levinson 2015 circuity citation (closes ISS-1433).

WIN-068 c10 patches applied: (1) Finding formula corrected from delta_Z=FSF×baseline to delta_Z=baseline×coverage×FSF, misattributed BOU clause removed. (2) P3 structural inversion fixed — scope declaration moved to front ('39-eclipse ensemble does not invoke FSF').

expansion_tracker_repair.description: Workspace-sync 5cc4b14 overwrote e7efc30's expansion-tracker updates, resetting EXP-202/207-210/212/213 integrated flags to undefined. Fixed by re-applying integrated=true, status=operator-approved for all 7 Phase A1 EXPs.

internal_issues.description: TLDR-detail anchor gap: '0.4% deviation' figure in TLDRs not anchored in detail_evidence. Fixed by EXP-231.
Unsourced terrain counter-model. Fixed by EXP-231 with Huber & Rust 2016 + Giacomin & Levinson 2015 citations.
c10 H5: Chapman (1933) citation format ambiguous (vol:page vs vol:issue unclear).
c10 H6: Tier-1 Steelman sentence appears verbatim in both detail_evidence ¶4 and detail_verdict_text ¶4.
c10 H4: Pre-rename phrasing 'the refraction fix leaves physical sun altitude indeterminate' still in detail_evidence ¶2.
c4 H4: SAA American cell centre 'near 80°W' is imprecise — recent WMM/CHAOS-7 places centroid ~60-70°W.
c4 H5: Queue entry 229 reason text misattributes WIN-040 integration to EXP-226 (should be EXP-225). Metadata only.
c9 H3: Toroidal geometry concession slightly incomplete — form reduces to two symmetric poles under any reasonable topology.
c9 H4: λ is dome-internal parameter (different in kind from curve-fit A,C). Micro-edit to distinguish.

staleness_gate_notes: WIN-040.c4: Critical (PNAS wrong citation) and major (ESR wrong citation, H(r) mislabel) all fixed by c4bfd80. Moderate hole 4 (cell centre) created as ISS-1444.
WIN-053.c9: Major (southern comparator TLDR) and moderate (asymmetric P3 comparators) fixed by c4bfd80. Minor holes 3+4 created as ISS-1446/1447.
WIN-069.c3: Moderate holes 3+4 fixed by EXP-231 this run. Holes 1+2+5+6 (major) remain open for separate EXP.
EXP-211-redesign-proposal: Human-note triggered review, not a queue item. ESCALATE findings already tracked in ISS-1425/1437.

recommended_actions.action: WIN-069 c3 major holes (H1 derives_from_dome tag contradiction; H2 10000x/250000x comparator endpoints) need separate EXP. ISS for H1 not yet created — flagged in EXP-231 out_of_scope.
ISS-1425 / EXP-211 Phase A2: ESCALATE findings (dropped 'self-serving denominator' sentence, a11y landmark, CC2 one-scroll weakening). Await operator return 2026-04-24.
ISS-1444: WIN-040 SAA cell centre value 80°W -> 60-70°W correction needed. Moderate accuracy concern.
PRED-105 silent-ignore now 5 days deep. Analyst noted no action needed; poller will continue tracking. Monitor for goalpost move on return.
